text: Strategic positioning receives support from analyst community, with UBS lifting its price target on Amazon stock, signaling confidence in the company's strength and growth prospects. Management under CEO Andrew R. Jassy continues to lead a workforce of 1.56 million full-time employees. The company actively defends its market position, as evidenced by Amazon publishing a rebuttal to reports alleging price increases following tariff announcements, indicating management's commitment to maintaining competitive pricing and brand reputation.
